notes:
v1.2.5 Update
✨ Adaptive UI Scaling: The VN stage UI now scales to fit your screen, designed around 1920×1080, so the dialogue box, nameplate, choices, and character frames keep their proportions on QHD, 4K, and ultrawide displays. A new client setting (on by default) controls this; turn it off for the previous fixed pixel sizes.
🔧 Dazed emotion visual: Dazed now shows a single slowly spinning head spiral instead of the previous ellipsis bubble, which could read like a chat typing indicator.
🐛 Framed dialogue text on wide screens: Dialogue text no longer starts too far left and runs under a framed dialogue box's border on ultrawide and high-resolution displays.

announcement.title: 🌸 Visual Novel Maker v1.2.5
announcement.content:
Visual Novel Maker v1.2.5 scales the stage UI to your screen and redraws the Dazed emotion.

  • Adaptive UI Scaling: The stage UI scales from a 1920×1080 reference, keeping proportions on QHD, 4K, and ultrawide. New client setting, on by default.
  • Dazed redesign: A single slowly spinning head spiral replaces the old ellipsis bubble, which could look like a chat typing indicator.
  • Framed dialogue fix: Text stays inside the frame border on wide and high-resolution displays.
